CustomField.formula:
IF ( RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Boeing', leaseworks__Total_w_o_BFE_SPE__c - leaseworks__Total_Credits__c ,
leaseworks__Total_Airframe_Basic_Price__c + leaseworks__Space_Flex__c - leaseworks__Airframe_Credit_Memorandum__c - leaseworks__Customer_Support_Credit_Memorandum__c - leaseworks__Fleet_Transition_Credit_Memorandum__c - leaseworks__Promotion_Credit_Memorandum__c - leaseworks__CFM_Engine_Credit__c - leaseworks__Airbus_Financing_Credit_Memorandum__c - leaseworks__Engine_Financing_Credit_Memorandum__c)
CustomField.label: Final Airframe Net Price
